text:
Mandai City (, Mandai-shi) is a city located in the Republic of East Gorteau. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 243 

Overview

Mandai City is the chosen rendezvous location by Gon and Knuckle. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

In a phone conversation, Gon and Knuckle decide to use this city as their rendezvous location in order to get in touch with one another. 

In Mandai City, the Extermination Team minus Morel and Knov and now plus the newly recruited Chimera Ants Meleoron and Ikalgo, discuss the plan over on how they will storm the Royal Palace of East Gorteau and how they will proceed from there. Another topic of discussion is Palm and if need be how will they rescue her, which is a pertinent subject to Gon. The discussion shifts back to how they'll storm the castle and the deduction of where the King's location is. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 24, Chapter 256 

References
